ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the stock price data falls (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are denominated */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
column_names: Date of the stock price data
